description: H1: SwiGLU activation with 8/3 expansion ratio (hidden_dim=1664)
H2: Divisive normalization in MLP after ReluSquared (groups of 64)
H3: Predictor-corrector residual connections with learnable beta (init 0)
H4: PD residual scaling with learnable deriv_lambdas (init 0)
H7: Leaky integral residual accumulator with integral_lambdas (init 0, decay 0.9)
H8: Per-head learnable attention temperature (init 1.0, scalar_lr, at GPT level)
H10: SwiGLU + PD residual stacking (H6+H4 combined)
H12: LAWA/EMA weight averaging (beta=0.999), last_iterate=0.963275, ema=1.142475
H13: QK-Norm Linf relaxation with 1/sqrt(head_dim) scaling
H11: Peri-LN output normalization on sublayer outputs
H15: Triple Stack H6+H4+H14 (SwiGLU + PD Residual + Factored Embeddings)
H19: SwiGLU + Factored Embeddings (H6+H14 stack, no PD)
H17: Tail-Phase EMA (beta=0.99, warmdown only), last_iterate=0.956133, ema=0.956294 [BASELINE CONTAMINATED: H14 already in codebase]
H16: Factored Embeddings Bottleneck Dim Sweep (192-dim)
H22: PD Residual + Factored Embeddings Stack (H4+H14, no SwiGLU)
